results.title: Planet Carrier - an overview | ScienceDirect Topics
results.snippet: A most typical planetary system consists of sun, planet, planet pin, carrier and ring gear. Modelling the complete system in a FEM model is very complicated, and the time needed for an accurate analysis is very high.
